name: Mayonnaise Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together 2 cups of flour, 5 teaspoons of cocoa powder, 1 cup of sugar, and 2 teaspoons of baking soda.
2. Add the mayonnaise, cold water, and vanilla extract to the sifted ingredients.
3. Beat all ingredients for 5 minutes until well combined.
4. Grease and flour a pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 25 minutes.
7. Use any type of icing desired.
